publishedAbstract: - Pods may fail to create with events similar to below: ~~~ Failed to create pod sandbox: rpc error: code = Unknown desc = failed to create pod network sandbox (): error adding pod to CNI network "multus-cni-network": plugin type="multus-shim" name="multus-cni-network" failed (add): CmdAdd (shim): CNI request failed with status 400: 'ContainerID:" " Netns:"/var/run/netns/07c7c06f-88df-4d59-b18d-a062f632261f" IfName:"eth0" Args:"IgnoreUnknown=1;K8S_POD_NAMESPACE=;K8S_POD_NAME=;K8S_POD_INFRA_CONTAINER_ID=;K8S_POD_UID= " Path:"" ERRORED: error configuring pod [/] networking: [/ /:whereabouts-example]: error adding container to network "whereabouts-example": error at storage engine: client rate limiter Wait returned an error: rate: Wait(n=1) would exceed context deadline ': StdinData: {"auxiliaryCNIChainName":"vendor-cni-chain","binDir":"/var/lib/cni/bin","clusterNetwork":"/host/run/multus/cni/net.d/10-ovn-kubernetes.conf","cniVersion":"0.3.1","daemonSocketDir":"/run/multus/socket","globalNamespaces":"default,openshift-multus,openshift-sriov-network-operator,openshift-cnv","logLevel":"verbose","logToStderr":true,"name":"multus-cni-network","namespaceIsolation":true,"type":"multus-shim"} ~~~- Pods can be created when attached to a different or NEW whereabouts IP range network-attachment-definition but not in an existing one.
publishedTitle: OCP4: Pods assigned to network-attachment-definition of type Whereabouts cannot schedule with 400 error from CNI during creation
